title: Stranvaesia nussia
intro: There is no information available on the plant Stranvaesia nussia.
taxonomy: Stranvaesia nussia is classified within the family Rosaceae, which includes a wide range of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. This family consists of approximately 5,000 species, with many being economically significant for their fruit, flowers, and timber. Stranvaesia nussia is a member of the genus Stranvaesia, which is native to the Himalayan region. The genus Stranvaesia is closely related to the genus Rhododendron, with both being part of the subfamily Rosoideae. Further classification of Stranvaesia nussia can be made at the species, genus, and family levels.
